pm-orchestrator.description: Orchestrates PM workflows across multiple models. Delegates code review, competitive research, ELI5, tickets, and PRFAQ to specialized sub-agents with different models.

codebase-analyst.description: Analyzes codebases and produces structured PM-friendly architecture summaries.

competitive-analyst.description: Researches competitors and produces structured intelligence matrices.

eli5-expert.description: Writes plain-English explanations of technical features for executives.

ticket-engineer.description: Generates structured engineering tickets from code context and feature descriptions.

prfaq-writer.description: Writes PRFAQ documents (press release + FAQ) grounded in codebase context.
